description: Submit one registered action kind to the native mod-wm-bridge action queue. The native action kind is selected in payload.native_action_kind and must be one of the fixed server-side verbs.

player_apply_aura.notes: Applies spell_id as an aura to the scoped online player. target_player_guid must equal the scoped request PlayerGUID in Primitive Pack 1.

player_cast_spell.notes: Makes the scoped online player cast spell_id. target defaults to self and may be selected/player_target. triggered defaults true so operator scenes can use server-side instant casts.

player_set_display_id.notes: Temporarily sets the scoped player's display/native display and optional scale. restore=true calls RestoreDisplayId instead of setting a new model.

player_remove_aura.notes: Removes spell_id from the scoped online player. target_player_guid must equal the scoped request PlayerGUID in Primitive Pack 1.

player_restore_health_power.notes: Restores flat or percent health and active power. power_type may be active/current, mana, rage, focus, energy, runic_power, or numeric 0-6.

player_add_item.notes: Stores the item in bags for the scoped online player and can mark the created stack soulbound.

player_add_money.notes: Adds a positive copper amount to the scoped online player.

player_add_reputation.notes: Adjusts one faction for the scoped online player; no_spillover defaults true.

creature_spawn.notes: Spawns a temporary WM-owned creature near the scoped player and records it in wm_bridge_world_object with LiveGUIDLow.

creature_despawn.notes: Despawns only a creature row owned by the scoped player in wm_bridge_world_object.

creature_say.notes: Makes only a scoped WM-owned creature say text.

creature_emote.notes: Runs an emote id and/or text emote on only a scoped WM-owned creature.

creature_cast_spell.notes: Makes only a scoped WM-owned creature cast spell_id. target defaults to the scoped player and may be self/creature or selected/player_target.

creature_set_display_id.notes: Sets or restores display/native display for only a scoped WM-owned live creature.

creature_set_scale.notes: Sets object scale for only a scoped WM-owned live creature. Native clamps scale to 0.10-5.00.

guardrails: No arbitrary SQL, shell command, GM command, or file edit payloads are accepted.
The C++ module validates player scope and DB policy again before executing.
Priority, sequence, target coordinate, and expiry fields are queue metadata; action-specific payload data stays inside payload.
Sequence submission is a manual/admin testing path first, not a default LLM multi-action saga path.
Most mutation verbs are policy-disabled and/or not implemented until hardened in the lab.
